title: An odd request
wikitext:
[]: An odd request...             Quote Post by V » Sat Jul 14, 2007 8:48 pm this is odd, but I first saw Eva when I watched the GUTTED episodes 1 and 2 on Cartoon Network's Giant Robot Week in 2003. I had no idea what it was (I didn't even like anime at the time) but I thought it was pretty cool. Thus I tuned in when Adult Swim actually ran the (mostly) unedited series years later. Anyway, I didn't really understand the heavily edited episode and its been years, but basically as a matter of "I want to laugh *at* it and not *with* it" does anyone have a video file of that edited Giant Robot showing gathering dust in the bottom of their hard drives? Looking back on it it sounds literally insane....I mean they cut out "all occurances of cigarettes and beer" ? WTF mate?

[]:             Quote Post by Kyle » Sat Jul 14, 2007 9:20 pm I think your outta luck cause' any sane fan would have burned that piece of shit years ago...mayby reichus got it.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Jul 15, 2007 12:03 am Reichu never saw it. And she doesn't have it, either.

[]:             Quote Post by Zkh » Sun Jul 15, 2007 12:14 am That's the first time I saw EVA too, barely remember any of it besides 'big purple robot'. Imagine Toonami aired the whole series, would the off screen sex scene just be 3 minutes of silence?

[]:             Quote Post by Fearthebait » Sun Jul 15, 2007 2:33 am The first time I saw Evangelion was on vacation in 2004. It was Episode 1 so I don't think there was anything major that they would have cut out that you described. I guess I'll look around a bit.

[]:             Quote Post by CitizenGeek » Sat Sep 08, 2007 5:58 am I would love to laugh at a Cartoon Network edited version of Neon Genesis Evangelion! Is there anything on YouTube? Did they just slaughter the first two eps with their editing, or was it the whole series?

[]:             Quote Post by CorporalChaos » Sat Sep 08, 2007 7:27 am CitizenGeek wrote: I would love to laugh at a Cartoon Network edited version of Neon Genesis Evangelion! Is there anything on YouTube? Did they just slaughter the first two eps with their editing, or was it the whole series?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Sep 08, 2007 8:37 am CorporalChaos wrote: There was a relevant list of edits somewhere..

[]:             Quote Post by CitizenGeek » Sat Sep 08, 2007 10:36 am The Eva Monkey wrote: CorporalChaos wrote: There was a relevant list of edits somewhere..

[]:             Quote Post by Sandoz » Sat Sep 08, 2007 12:27 pm I'm especially fond of the "Misato wearing a bikini in her bathtub" edit. Oh, Toonami.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sat Sep 08, 2007 2:04 pm Imagine how hard this sort of thing would be if anime didn't generally use limited animation...

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Sep 08, 2007 3:39 pm Thank God I was too busy with school to bother watching Toonami at that point, so luckily I missed out. Toonami sucks nowadays, anyway.

[]:             Quote Post by JP » Sat Sep 08, 2007 11:06 pm Zkh wrote: That's the first time I saw EVA too, barely remember any of it besides 'big purple robot'. Imagine Toonami aired the whole series, would the off screen sex scene just be 3 minutes of silence?
